result.stdout:
[04:04:59 INF] MNI CLI (http://mnisoft.com)
[04:04:59 INF] Version 4.3.0-dev (Development)
[04:04:59 INF] 
Usage:

    mni <command> <target> [options]

Command List:

    > help: Show command line help. Write ` mni help <command> `
    > new: Generate a new solution based on the MNI startup templates.
    > get-source: Download the source code of the specified module.
    > update: Update all MNI related NuGet packages and NPM packages in a solution or project to the latest version.
    > add-package: Add a new MNI package to a project by adding related NuGet package dependencies and [DependsOn(...)] attributes.
    > add-module: Add a multi-package module to a solution by finding all packages of the module, finding related projects in the solution and adding each package to the corresponding project in the solution.
    > login: Sign in to http://localhost:44333/.
    > logout: Sign out from http://localhost:44333/.
    > generate-proxy: Generates Angular service proxies and DTOs to consume HTTP APIs.
    > remove-proxy: Generates Angular service proxies and DTOs to consume HTTP APIs.
    > suite: Install, update, remove or start MNI Suite. See https://commercial.mni.com/tools/suite.
    > switch-to-preview: Switches packages to preview MNI version.
    > switch-to-stable: Switches packages to stable MNI version from preview version.
    > switch-to-nightly: Switches packages to nightly preview MNI version.
    > translate: Mainly used to translate Mni's resources (JSON files) easier.
    > build: Builds a dotnet repository and dependent repositories or a solution.
    > bundle: Bundles all third party styles and scripts required by modules and updates index.html file.
    > create-migration-and-run-migrator 

To get a detailed help for a command:

    mni help <command>

See the documentation for more info: http://docs.mnisoft.com/en/mni/latest/CLI
